## Checklist

- [ ] The package is published on npm
- [ ] I have personally used this package in a project
- [ ] The submission is placed at `packages/<category>/<package-name>/README.md`
- [ ] The README includes the **problem** that led me to this package
- [ ] The README includes an **install command**
- [ ] The README includes at least one **code example**
- [ ] All links are working (npm, GitHub, docs)
- [ ] No broken image paths (screenshots referenced in the README exist in the folder)
